name: Impossible Broccoli-Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim large leaves from the broccoli bunch and remove tough ends of lower stalks. Wash broccoli thoroughly, then cut florets and stems into thin slices.
2. In a saucepan over medium heat, combine broccoli, onion, and 1/4 cup water. Cook for 6 to 8 minutes, stirring occasionally until vegetables are tender. Drain well using paper towels to press out excess moisture.
3. Whisk eggs in a bowl. Gradually add milk, Swiss cheese, Parmesan cheese, ground nutmeg, pepper, and hot sauce (4 to 6 drops). Mix ingredients thoroughly.
4. Pour the egg mixture into a greased 10-inch pie plate. Sprinkle with additional Parmesan cheese.
5. Bake at 350°F for about 30 minutes or until set. Allow to cool for 10 minutes before serving.
YIELD: One 10-inch pie.
